description_long: This is a modern, two-story house set on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and surrounded by several large, leafy trees. The house features a flat roof and a clean, white facade with large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front of the house has a paved driveway leading to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a simple, understated design. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some larger panes on the ground floor and smaller ones on the upper level. The property is bordered by grass and a few shrubs, giving it a suburban, residential feel. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a clean, minimalist design, surrounded by trees and a manicured lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement, framed by two large trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back lawn, large rear windows, and the flat roof, with trees positioned at the corners of the property.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the elongated facade, side windows, and the open grassy area with trees on either side.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the driveway and entryway partially obscured by trees, emphasizing the house's integration with the landscape.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat overhang, paved driveway, and minimal decorative elements
